summary.key_theme: 公司宣布高達 200 億美元的股票回購計畫與股息調升，有效提振市場信心並抵銷智慧型手機市場疲軟的擔憂。

bullish.title: Qualcomm Increases Quarterly Cash Dividend and Announces New $20 Billion Stock Repurchase Authorization
bullish.reason: 公司正式宣布 200 億美元的股票回購計畫並調升股息，直接提升股東權益報酬率，是近期最強勁的利多訊號。

bullish.title: Why I'm Still Buying Qualcomm — Qualcomm Incorporated looks undervalued vs peers: record revenue, $20B buyback, auto growth offset Apple risks.
bullish.reason: 分析師指出汽車業務成長與回購計畫足以抵銷對 Apple 依賴的風險，認為目前估值被低估。

bullish.title: Qualcomm (QCOM), Wayve Partner to Accelerate AI-Driven Autonomous Driving
bullish.reason: 與 Wayve 合作開發 AI 自動駕駛技術，強化了 Qualcomm 在汽車電子與 AI 領域的長期成長潛力。

bullish.title: QUALCOMM, Inc. (QCOM) Partners with Keysight to Advance 5G emerging 6G networks
bullish.reason: 與 Keysight 合作推進 6G 網路技術，有助於維持公司在通訊技術領域的領先地位。

bearish.title: Corning vs. Qualcomm: Which 5G Enabler Stock is the Better Buy Now?
bearish.reason: 分析指出 Corning 在光纖與 AI 需求帶動下，相較於 Qualcomm 具有更好的估值與成長潛力。

bearish.title: Qualcomm: Smartphone Weakness Offset By Automotive And IoT Strength
bearish.reason: 雖然看好汽車與 IoT 成長，但明確點出 2026 年智慧型手機市場面臨的逆風，對短期營收構成壓力。

neutral.title: Is It Time To Reconsider Qualcomm (QCOM) After Recent Share Price Weakness?
neutral.reason: 探討股價波動與內在價值，未給出明確買賣建議，僅提供投資人評估視角。

neutral.title: QUALCOMM Incorporated (QCOM) Is a Trending Stock: Facts to Know Before Betting on It
neutral.reason: 僅整理公司基本面事實，作為熱門股的資訊彙整，無明顯多空傾向。

neutral.title: As Qualcomm Stock Raises Its Dividend, Is QCOM Stock a Buy?
neutral.reason: 針對股息調升進行討論，但保持中立觀點，分析投資人是否應進場。
